---
name: Skill Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing skill
title: '[IMPROVEMENT] '
labels: improvement
assignees: ''
---

## Which skill?
<!-- Name or folder path, e.g. `skills/api-docs-generator` -->

## What's the current problem?
<!-- What is the skill doing poorly or missing? -->

## Suggested improvement
<!-- What should change? Be specific — extra step, better example, different output format, etc. -->

## Agent environment you tested with
<!-- Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Cline, etc. -->

## Are you willing to open a PR?
- [ ] Yes, I'll update the SKILL.md and open a PR
- [ ] No, flagging for the maintainers
